name: hyperbounce
description: A neon 3D arcade runner built with JavaScript, Three.js, and WebGL.

scripts.build:pages: npm run build && npm run stage
scripts.test: node --test test/collision.test.cjs test/shared.test.cjs test/ui.test.cjs test/models.test.cjs test/manager.test.cjs test/scoring.test.cjs test/audio.test.cjs test/auth.test.cjs test/leaderboard.test.cjs test/game.test.cjs test/render_quality.test.cjs test/record_celebration.test.cjs test/tempo.test.cjs test/worker.test.cjs test/release.test.cjs

author: Ray Munoz
